_comment: TRUE POSITIVE — SP-770001: VPN Impossible Travel — same user from two geographically impossible locations
scenario: User authenticated to VPN from London at 08:00, then from Shanghai at 08:45 — physically impossible travel
why_tp: London to Shanghai in 45 minutes requires 12,267 km/h — physically impossible
Two separate VPN sessions active simultaneously for the same user
Both sessions authenticated successfully — one or both use stolen credentials
analyst_action: Terminate both active VPN sessions for m.mueller
Contact m.mueller out-of-band (phone) to confirm their actual location
Force password reset and re-enrollment of MFA
Review all activity from the unauthorized session (commands run, files accessed)
